MemoSiege_APA_9X_4X

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74F
Recv ID: 76F
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 2A
Func Name: Drive Position

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "174",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0004"
  }
]

        "ref": true
      },
      "CRC VIN": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
  },

        "firstbyte": 15
      },
      "temps d'attente après une protection exterieur": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      }
    }
  },
